reconciliation.scope: Release arc: v0.15.0 (derived on read from the last reachable tag) through evaluated_commit (intended release v0.15.1). The v0.15.0..evaluated_commit arc is docs/comment-only and carries zero consumer-facing behavioral change: the five commits 94afbc0 (research field-report evidence preservation), 4a61db0 (permconfig/decision docs + 21 lines of `//` comments in internal/permconfig/tables.go, with the permission-templates source and rendered mirror co-changed in lockstep as a correctly-synced doc update), 753e831 (decision-memo correction), 72a7acb (P3 context-pruning behavioral spec), and cddac9c5 (vh-solara research disposition addendum) changed no Go logic, constant, inventory, or template-rendered contract — the only Go file in the arc is internal/permconfig/tables.go (comment-only), and drift=0 and doctor=HEALTHY were verified at the evaluated commit with a fresh binary. The vh-solara orchestration items referenced by the research memos in this arc are explicit non-goals for this docs-only release and are future-slice backlog. Forward-add (B2) release ceremony: the readiness artifact .vh-agent-harness/release-readiness-pass.json is committed as the single-path artifact commit R (an immediate child of the release-prep commit d546eb5, which is HEAD^^ at tag time), pinned via its commit_sha field to d546eb5 (the commit the readiness agent evaluated); this manifest commit M is an immediate single-path child of R (=HEAD^ at tag time). At HEAD=M the handshake invariants hold: HEAD^^ = d546eb5 matches the artifact's commit_sha; HEAD^ = R with HEAD^^..HEAD^ changing only the artifact path; HEAD^ == R == evaluated_commit == manifest_parent_commit AND tree(HEAD^) == evaluated_tree AND HEAD^..HEAD changing only this manifest path. Release mode is manifest-authority-only; the authorized release wrapper and CI recheck always read this committed manifest. release_base.value is advisory (derive-on-read via gitLatestTag excluding --release-version); kind stays operator-attested. records[] dispositions are operator-attested and unchanged by the releaser's SHA recompute.

records.summary: P1-LINEAGE-002 deferred coverage (F6/F7) — conditional on a future prune phase.
records.reason: Not part of the current release. Retained for audit with unsupported legacy trigger metadata (the source card's trigger grammar uses a '||' separator, a directory operand, and a non-predicate feature: term, which the strict release-mode predicate parser rejects). Re-evaluate only when a prune phase is pursued or renderstate/seam is touched for deletion logic. The canonical no+disclose+invalid disposition lets the release proceed while disclosing the conditional follow-up and its invalid metadata state.
